name: Stuffed Flank Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 cup soft, whole wheat bread - crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the steak to tenderize.
2. Cut a pocket in the center of the steak.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients and mix well.
4. Stuff the steak with the mixture and secure the opening using skewers.
5. Broil 3-4 inches from heat for 3-4 minutes on each side, or longer to taste.
6. To serve, cut thin slices diagonally across the grain.
(246 calories per serving) 1 serving=1/2 Vegetable exchange 1 Bread exchange 3 Lean Meat exchanges
